widgets_values: FLW, the shot seamlessly transforms and flows continuously back into itself. The scene morphs smoothly, camera steady, lighting consistent throughout.

Turn a video that starts and ends on the same frame into a seamless loop. The join between the end and the start is replaced with a generated transition so the motion flows continuously, and the clip's audio is kept.
How much of the clip the model looks at to keep the loop smooth.
How long the generated transition at the loop point lasts.
Output a silent video — skips muxing any audio into the loop.
